name: canvas-build-page
description: Builds the ExampleHomepage Canvas Page with a hero section and 4-card product grid using preset-based design system patterns. Demonstrates: wrapper presets (hero-dark), heading presets (hero, card-title), paragraph presets (lead, caption), card presets (dark), inherited text color from dark sections, and individual prop overrides. Creates 27 components programmatically.
preconditions: Active default theme has SDC components registered in Canvas
